/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/MyProject.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyProject.dir/src/Agent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyProject.dir/src/LinkFetcher.cpp.o -o MyProject  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ronen/scraper/build/bin /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so bin/libllama.so.0.0.9013 bin/libggml.so.0.10.2 bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.10.2 bin/libggml-base.so.0.10.2
